---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Garnet
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's missing or painful today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like Garnet to do? Sketch the API / CLI command / behaviour if
you can.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Links, prior art in other frameworks, or anything else that helps.
